  • Module

  • Tree

Uses of Package
org.kink_lang.kink

Packages that use org.kink_lang.kink
Package
Description
org.kink_lang.kink
The core package of the Kink vm.
org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun
Interfaces used to make a host fun, which is a FunVal to perform action in Java code.
org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun.graph
Provides the Execution Graph DSL, which is a convenient way to invoke Kink funs from Java actions or handlers.
org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun.graph.impl
Implementations of the Execution Graph DSL.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.callstack
Call stacks used in the evaluator.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile
Compiles itree to FunVal by runtime bytecode generation.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile.classgen
Generates compiled classes.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile.javaclassir
Intermediate representation before JVM byte code compilation.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile.tempval
Temporary vals used by generated code.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.intrinsicsupport
Provides funs used from intrinsics.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.mod.java
Package of JAVA etc.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.mod.random
The internal classes for mods under kink/random.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.mod.stopwatch
Provides kink/STOPWATCH mod.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.num
Provides utility classes around numbers.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.sym
Provides sym registry.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.vec
Internal representation of vec vals.
  • Classes in org.kink_lang.kink used by org.kink_lang.kink
    Class
    Description
    BindingHelper
    The helper class of local binding vals.
    BindingVal
    A binding val.
    BinHelper
    The helper for bin vals.
    BinVal
    A bin val, which represents an immutable array of bytes.
    BoolHelper
    The helper for bool vals.
    ComponentRegistry
    The component registry of the VM.
    ExceptionHelper
    The helper of excetpion vals.
    ExceptionVal
    An exception val.
    FunHelper
    A helper for funs.
    FunVal
    A fun val.
    HostResultCore
    The core of the result of a host call.
    JavaHelper
    The helper of JavaVals.
    JavaVal
    A java val.
    LocationHelper
    The helper for location vals.
    LocationVal
    A location in a program.
    NumHelper
    The helper for num vals.
    NumVal
    A num val.
    SharedVars
    Container of vars which are shared among values.
    SharedVarsFactory
    The factory of SharedVars instances.
    StrHelper
    The helper of str vals.
    StrVal
    A str val.
    SymRegistry
    The bidirectional registry of syms and sym-handles.
    TraceHelper
    The helper for traces.
    TraceVal
    A trace.
    Val
    A Kink value or val.
    VarrefHelper
    The helper for varref vals.
    VarrefVal
    A varref val.
    VecHelper
    The helper of vec vals.
    VecVal
    A vec val.
    Vm
    A Kink vm, or runtime.
